transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] and are you still on the coreg for hypertension and the lexapro for anxiety ? i had prediabetes too , but i got it under control by changing my diet .
- [Findings] patient is a 60 year old , right-handed male , referred today for evaluation of numbness and tingling .
- [Findings] and no history of thyroid issues , correct ?
- [Findings] constitutional , you have fatigue and weight gain ; gi , you have excessive appetite and bloating ; eyes have floaters ; cardiovascular shows shortness of breath and leg swelling ; endocrine , you're always hungry ; skin , you have some nail bed changes , dryness , itching ; musculoskeletal , you have gout and muscle pain .
- [Findings] all right , we're going to go ahead and do the neurologic examination .
- [Findings] sensation is normal , except pin prick sensation diminished in third and fourth fingers on the right .
- [Findings] reflexes are 1+ and symmetric ; 2+ knees ; toes are downgoing bilaterally .
- [Findings] tinel sign positive at both wrists and both elbows . rest of exam is normal .
- [Findings] first , i want to determine exactly where the nerve irritation is coming from . we'll need to schedule you for a nerve test , which is called an emg test .
- [Findings] after the tests are complete , you can return here for a follow-up visit . if you're still having symptoms , we can consider a referral to our hand clinic , possibly for injections or carpal tunnel release se- surgery .
- [History of Present Illness] i've had this numbness and tingling for a few weeks now . yes , ever since my car wreck last december when i broke them ... well , once they healed , i mean , i noticed it more , the tingling and the numbness . and you still wear the splint only on the right wrist ?
- [History of Present Illness] i've also been having some s- mild stiffness in my neck too . i hit my head during the accident , and they told me it was a contusion . and where would you say the tingling and numbness is ?
- [History of Present Illness] and on the left , the symptoms extend from the pinky and ring finger . and is there any pain or just tingling and numbness ? eh , it's mainly just sore . the tingling happens more when they hurt , but when it goes away , the tingling is dull . and when do you feel these symptoms ?
- [History of Present Illness] and do you experience any loss of sensation in your hands or fingers ? like , feeling something ?
- [History of Present Illness] they also gave me some nerve pain medicine , but i have n't been taking it like i should .
- [History of Present Illness] yeah , it feels like a zing up my wrist and something into my elbow too .
- [History of Present Illness] all right , so what i am seeing today is bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome or , potentially , this could also be bilateral cubital tunnel syndrome . however , your symptom presentation suggests car- bilateral carpal syndrome , as the nerve in your wrists are aggravated by your past trauma . this is causing the pain and tingling you were describing to me .
- [History of Present Illness] all right , keep wearing your splints , and i will see you after those studies .
- [Plan] you could also refer ... we could also refer you to an orthopedist for the same treatment .
